milestones.name: 100% warning-free TypeScript Compilation
milestones.description: Resolved type checking error ts(2322) in chat.tsx by changing non-standard title prop to accessibilityLabel. Verified project compiles with zero errors.

milestones.name: Validation of Mobile/Desktop Layout Parity
milestones.description: Verified that all desktop (Dual-Pane) and mobile layouts maintain complete feature parity, specifically stopover accordion, automatic arrival hour, GPS alias matching, and RLS admin features.

milestones.name: Documentation Synced
milestones.description: README.md, audit.md, and nos_idees.md updated to record the latest hotfixes and structural verifications.

next_steps: Automate payment validation through a Mobile Money aggregator.
